name: Sara Al-Qahtani
bio: Sara specializes in building fast, polished UIs. She has handled several third-party API integrations and is known for clean, maintainable frontend code.

name: Ahmed Al-Harbi
bio: Ahmed has deep experience with backend architecture, authentication systems, and SQL optimization. Go-to person for anything database or API related.

name: Nora Al-Shehri
bio: Nora owns quality across most major projects. She builds test plans from scratch and is excellent at finding edge cases others miss.

name: Khalid Al-Dosari
bio: Khalid manages deployments, pipelines, and infrastructure. If something is broken in production or you need a new environment set up, he is who you call.

name: Lama Al-Otaibi
bio: Lama bridges the gap between technical teams and business stakeholders. She is the person to talk to when requirements are unclear or you need to understand a business process.

name: Faisal Al-Mutairi
bio: Faisal builds scalable backend services. He is the go-to for Python APIs, database design, and anything involving background jobs or notifications.

name: Reem Al-Zahrani
bio: Reem designs the user experience across all customer-facing products. If you need wireframes, design review, or user research, she is your first call.

name: Omar Al-Rasheed
bio: Omar works across the full stack and has deep OutSystems experience. He is the person to ask when a feature touches both frontend and backend and you are not sure where the problem is.

name: Hessa Al-Dossari
bio: Hessa keeps large projects on track. If you have a dependency blocker, need to escalate something, or are unsure who owns a deliverable, she can help.

name: Turki Al-Anazi
bio: Turki builds data pipelines and reporting infrastructure. If you need data extracted, transformed, or visualized, he is the right person.
